explanation: Arg (R) - Positively charged basic side chain.
Asp (D) - Negatively charged acidic side chain.
Cys (C) - Polar side chain with thiol (-SH) group.
Gln (Q) - Polar, uncharged side chain with amide.
Glu (E) - Negatively charged acidic side chain.
Lys (K) - Positively charged basic side chain.
Pro (P) - Rigid cyclic secondary amino acid.
Thr (T) - Polar uncharged with secondary alcohol.
